description:
Recto: poetry in honor of an (anonymous?) Nagid the son of a Nagid. Looks like the hand of Nāṣir al-Adīb al-ʿIbrī (active ca. 1300). 

Verso: poetry in honor of ha-Sar Nissim, in a different hand an ink than recto. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
